title: Tuberculosis patient_1
source_name_ch1: PBMCs isolated from naïve active tuberculosis patients
treatment_protocol_ch1: PBMCs were isolated using Histopaque-1077 from whole blood.
extract_protocol_ch1: Whole RNA was isolated using RNeasy Mini Kit (QIAGEN; Cat No./ID: 74104).
extract_protocol_ch1.1: TruSeq RNA Library Prep Kit v2 was used as per the manufacture’s instruction
data_processing.6: Supplementary files format and content: CSV file containing transcript counts in TPM
